query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sites) as total_sites,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zones) as total_zones,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM areas) as total_areas;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sites) as total_sites,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zones) as total_zones,
